configuration.scalaLite.mode.description: Default Scala Lite mode (A/B/C) when opening the workspace.
configuration.scalaLite.logLevel.descrip: Log verbosity for Scala Lite internal structured logs.
configuration.scalaLite.diagnostics.enab: Enable or disable syntax diagnostics collection.
configuration.scalaLite.diagnostics.trig: When diagnostics should run: on save or on type.
configuration.scalaLite.formatter.format: Run formatter automatically when saving Scala files.
configuration.scalaLite.activeProfile.de: Active Scala Lite task profile name for this workspace.
configuration.scalaLite.goToDefinition.s: Cache chooser selections in-memory to auto-jump repeated go-to-definition requests in the same context.
Bypass sticky go-to-definition cache and always run full staged resolution.
configuration.scalaLite.hover.previewLin: Number of definition body preview lines to show in high-confidence hover cards (0-5).
